## Constraints

- This hackathon uses **Azure only**. Never reference AWS, GCP, or other cloud providers.
- Do NOT include README.md files in challenge folders — all instructions go in the corresponding track file under `tracks/`.
- Do NOT provide ready-to-paste solutions for copilot-instructions, agents, or prompts. Describe WHAT to achieve, not HOW.
- Each challenge should be completable in 4-6 hours.

## Sync Rules

When modifying tracks or challenges, keep everything in sync:

- Track changes → update the corresponding challenge starter code.
- Challenge changes → update the track file that references it.
- Any structural change → update the root `README.md`.
